name: swarmtumx
description: tmux-first infinite canvas terminals for macOS

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/runtime/paths.js && node --check src/runtime/state-store.js && node --check src/runtime/tmux-adapter.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js && node --check bin/swarmtumx-bridge.cjs
